hooks.command: LOCK="/tmp/claude-deploy-$(pwd | md5sum | cut -c1-8).lock"; [ -f "$LOCK" ] && exit 0; touch "$LOCK"; cd "/d/Work/Claude Projects/AI Watsapp PG Accountant" && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A >/dev/null 2>&1 && git commit -m "auto: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" >/dev/null 2>&1 && git push >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf '{"systemMessage": "auto: committed + pushed"}'; else printf '{"systemMessage": "auto: no changes"}'; fi
